objective: Get past the ferryman guarding passage across the river.
narrative_context: The crossing is the only obvious way forward.
trigger: The party arrives at the dock at dusk.

stakes.failure: The ferryman refuses and alerts nearby patrol.
stakes.complication: The ferryman reveals a hidden price or secret condition.

environment.description: A narrow ferry platform rocks against the dock in cold mist.

npcs.name: Ferryman Edda
secrets: knows the river is active tonight

summary.resolved: The party secures passage, but the crossing exposes a new pressure point.

resolved: LOOP-001 | Get past the ferryman guarding passage across the river.
LOOP-002 | Decide whether to trust the ferryman's warning | pressure: medium | next: verify the hidden price of the crossing
The ferryman admits the river is active tonight and someone has been paying to slow travelers down.
Safe passage and a concrete warning about the river.
The crossing is now possible, but the party has been noticed.
Press the ferryman's warning before the paying faction gets ahead of it.
